lesson-1-1.title: Lesson 1 — Business Validation
keyPoints: Customer discovery is more important than product development
Use social media to test ideas with zero budget

keyTerms.MVP: Minimum Viable Product — the simplest version of your idea
keyTerms.ICP: Ideal Customer Profile — who exactly you are selling to

lesson-1-1.summary: In this lesson, we covered why most new businesses fail and how to avoid that trap by talking to real customers first...
